meta.story: India's Monsoon Crisis 2026 — Historic June Drought

events.name: June 2026 India Drought
events.description: Third-driest June in 126 years with 42% rainfall deficit. Caused by El Niño and stalled monsoon.

events.name: 2026 El Niño Event
events.description: Nino 3.4 index at +1.7°C, strengthening through monsoon season.

events.name: Kharif Sowing Decline 2026
events.description: Kharif sowing down 22.7% YoY (182.72 vs 236.46 lakh ha). Oilseeds worst hit at -53%.

events.name: India Reservoir Depletion 2026
events.description: Major reservoirs at 26.4% capacity vs 36% last year. Karnataka at 14.7% vs 48.6%.

events.name: India Food Price Surge 2026
events.description: Tomato prices up 24% YoY. Tomato inflation at 48.43% in May. Food inflation at 4.78%.

events.name: IMD July 2026 Monsoon Forecast
events.description: July rainfall forecast at below 94% of LPA. Below-average monsoon expected.

organizations.name: India Meteorological Department
organizations.description: India's national weather service. Director-General: Mrutyunjay Mohapatra.

organizations.name: Reserve Bank of India
organizations.description: India's central bank. Governor: Sanjay Malhotra. Repo rate at 5.25%.

organizations.name: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare
organizations.description: Government ministry overseeing agricultural policy and data collection.

organizations.name: Central Water Commission
organizations.description: Government agency monitoring reservoir levels across India.

organizations.name: National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (USA)
organizations.description: US agency tracking El Niño conditions. Confirmed >80% probability.

people.name: Mrutyunjay Mohapatra
people.description: Director-General of the India Meteorological Department. Announced July below-average forecast.

people.name: Sanjay Malhotra
people.description: Governor of the Reserve Bank of India. Warned of food inflation risks from weak monsoon.

people.name: KJ Ramesh
people.description: Former Director-General of IMD. Advised against panic, citing groundwater buffer.

countries.name: India
countries.description: Nearly $4 trillion economy. 42% of workforce in agriculture. 70% of annual rainfall from monsoon.

policies.name: RBI Repo Rate (5.25%)
policies.description: Repo rate held at 5.25% in June 2026 MPC meeting. Neutral stance. FY27 inflation projection: 5.1%.

policies.name: Fuel Sale Restrictions (June 12, 2026)
policies.description: Govt imposed fuel sale restrictions due to West Asia supply disruptions. Lifted July 1.

policies.name: LPG Cylinder Price Cut (July 1, 2026)
policies.description: 19 kg commercial LPG cylinder price reduced by ₹183.50.

relationships.description: El Niño conditions suppressed monsoon rainfall in June 2026
Rainfall deficit led to 22.7% reduction in kharif sowing
Lack of rainfall reduced reservoir storage levels
Monsoon deficit + heatwave disrupted food supply chains
IMD issued below-average July monsoon forecast
RBI set repo rate at 5.25% with neutral stance
Mrutyunjay Mohapatra is Director-General of IMD
Sanjay Malhotra is Governor of RBI
Food inflation may delay RBI rate cuts

timeline.title: IMD First-Stage Forecast
timeline.description: IMD forecasts 92% of LPA — below normal monsoon

timeline.title: IMD Downgrades to 90% of LPA
timeline.description: Second-stage forecast: 90% of LPA, 60% probability of deficient rainfall. El Niño confirmed.

timeline.title: Monsoon Onset Delayed
timeline.description: Monsoon reaches Kerala 3 days behind normal June 1 schedule.

timeline.title: RBI MPC Meeting
timeline.description: RBI holds repo rate at 5.25%. Governor flags monsoon risk to inflation. GDP forecast cut to 6.6%.

timeline.title: Fuel Sale Restrictions Imposed
timeline.description: Govt imposes fuel sale restrictions due to West Asia supply disruptions.

timeline.title: Monsoon Stalls
timeline.description: Monsoon stalls over southern Maharashtra for ~11 days. Deficit balloons to 46%.

timeline.title: Driest June of 21st Century Declared
timeline.description: India Today reports driest June of 21st century. El Niño at +1.7°C.

timeline.title: Kharif Sowing Data Released
timeline.description: Kharif sowing at 182.72 lakh ha — 22.7% decline YoY. Oilseeds down 53%.

timeline.title: June Confirmed 3rd Driest; July Below-Average Forecast
timeline.description: IMD confirms June 2026 as 3rd driest on record. July forecast: below 94% of LPA.

timeline.title: LPG Price Cut; Fuel Restrictions Lifted
timeline.description: Govt cuts LPG cylinder price by ₹183.50. Lifts fuel sale restrictions.

timeline.title: Mid-July Monsoon Assessment (Upcoming)
timeline.description: Critical checkpoint — if rainfall does not revive, drought declaration likely.

relatedStories.title: RBI's Monsoon Warning: Growth vs Inflation Outlook (June 2026)
